measurement_note: Size is P, the number of low-quality rows supplied in reverse problem-ID order. The reference filters once and sorts IDs in O(P log P). A correct correlated-rank ordering counts smaller IDs for every qualifying row, completes all tiers, and fails by quadratic scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 16 low-quality problems in reverse ID order
benchmark: 64 low-quality problems in reverse ID order
benchmark: 256 low-quality problems in reverse ID order
